amendments.text: (a) There must be a separate throttle control for each engine. (b) Throttle controls must be arranged to allow-- (1) Separate control of each engine; and (2) Simultaneous control of all engines. (c) Each throttle control must give a positive and immediate responsive means of controlling its engine. 64-17; Issued on 03/25/64. --> Link to eCFR --> NPRM ACTIONS:   Notice of Proposed Rulemaking. Notice No. 64-17; Issued on 03/25/64. 4080; Issued on 09/28/64. --> Link to eCFR --> FINAL RULE ACTIONS:   Final Rule. Docket No. 4080; Issued on 09/28/64.
